# Llavai

> Llavai is an AI rental concierge for Barcelona. Its AI voice agent, "Julia", calls estate agents in native Spanish within ~60 seconds of a new listing going live and books viewings. It is built for expats who don't speak fluent Spanish and keep losing flats to faster applicants.

## How it works
- Llavai monitors every new Barcelona rental listing, scores each one for appeal, and lays out the facts that matter so you skip the duds.
- Essential (€19/month) is self-serve: you call, but you see the best flats first.
- Pro (€185/month, by application): Julia calls every quality listing for you in native Barcelona Spanish, presents your tenant profile, and asks for a viewing.
- Pay-as-you-go call packs (1 call €12, 5 calls €49, 15 calls €119) bridge the two.
